description: Style NoteHot Water for men from davidoff is a fiery, oriental and masculine fragrance launched in 2009. The flacon matches the essence of the fragrance in passionate red glass and a black top. Product DetailsHot water has top notes of absynthe and red basil, a heart with tones of pimento and patchouli and a base of styrax and benzoinCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize110 ml
